Analytical/determination method/definiti: Edible portion coefficient (from as purchased to as described)
Coefficient de la portion comestible (rapport entre l’aliment décrit et l’aliment acheté)
Edible portion coefficient (from as described to as eaten)
Coefficient de la portion comestible (rapport entre l’aliment consommé et l’aliment décrit)

Sum of proximate components (g/100 g EP) = water (g/100 g EP) + total fat (g/100 g EP) + available carbohydrate (g/100 g EP) + total protein (g/100 g EP) + ash (g/100 g EP) + total dietary fibre (g/100 g EP) + alcohol (g/100 g EP)

Somme des macronutriments (g/100 g PC) = eau (g/100 g PC) + lipides totaux (g/100 g PC) + glucides disponibles (g/100 g PC) + protéines totales (g/100 g PC) + cendres (g/100 g PC) + fibres alimentaires totales (g/100 g PC) + alcool (g/100 g PC)
Energy (kJ/100 g EP) = total protein (g/100 g EP) × 17 + total fat (g/100 g EP) × 37 + available carbohydrate (g/100 g EP) × 17 + total dietary fibre (g/100 g EP) × 8 + alcohol (g/100 g EP) × 29

Énergie (kJ/100 g PC) = protéines totales (g/100 g PC) x 17 + lipides totaux (g/100 g PC) x 37 + glucides disponibles (g/100 g PC) x 17 + fibres alimentaires totales (g/100 g PC) x 8 + alcool (g/100 g PC) x 29
Energy (kcal/100 g EP) = total protein (g/100 g EP) × 4 + total fat (g/100 g EP) × 9 + available carbohydrate (g/100 g EP) × 4 + total dietary fibre (g/100 g EP) × 2 + alcohol (g/100 g EP) × 7

Énergie (kcal/100 g PC) = protéines totales (g/100 g PC) x 4 + lipides totaux (g/100 g PC) x 9 + glucides disponibles (g/100 g PC) x 4 + fibres alimentaires totales (g/100 g PC) x 2 + alcool (g/100 g PC) x 7
Total protein (g/100 g EP) = nitrogen conversion factor (XN) × total nitrogen (g/100 g EP)
Protéines totales (g/100 g PC) = facteur de conversion de l’azote (XN) x azote total (g/100 g PC)

Component in English: Fat, total or [fat, derived by analysis using continuous extraction]
Component in French: Lipides totaux ou [lipides dérivés d’une analyse par extraction continue]
Analytical/determination method/definiti: Mixed solvent extraction or [Soxhlet method with continuous extraction]
Extraction par solvant mixte ou [méthode de Soxhlet avec extraction continue]
Carbohydrate, available; calculated by difference (g/100 g EP) = 100 – (water + total fat + total protein + ash + total dietary fibre + alcohol) (g/100 g EP)
Glucides disponibles; calculés par différence (g/100 g PC) = 100 - (eau + lipides totaux + protéines totales + cendres + fibres alimentaires totales + alcool) (g/100 g PC)
Vitamin A in retinol equivalents (mcg/100 g EP) = retinol (mcg/100 g EP) + beta-carotene equivalents (mcg/100 g EP) / 6
Vitamine A en équivalent rétinol (mcg/100 g PC) = rétinol (mcg/100 g PC) + équivalent bêtacarotène (mcg/100 g PC) / 6

Component in English: Vitamin A (expressed in retinol activity equivalents)
Component in French: Vitamine A (exprimée en équivalent activité rétinol)
Analytical/determination method/definiti: Vitamin A in retinol activity equivalents (mcg/100 g EP) = retinol (mcg/100 g EP) + beta-carotene equivalents (mcg/100 g EP) / 12
Vitamine A en équivalent activité rétinol (mcg/100 g PC) = rétinol (mcg/100 g PC) + équivalent bêtacarotène (mcg/100 g PC) / 12
Beta-carotene equivalents (mcg/100 g EP) = beta-carotene (mcg/100 g EP) + alpha-carotene (mcg/100 g EP) / 2 + beta-cryptoxanthin (mcg/100 g EP) / 2 or [HPLC]
Équivalent bêta-carotène (mcg/100 g PC) = bêta-carotène (mcg/100 g PC) + alpha-carotène (mcg/100g PC) / 2 + bêta-cryptoxanthine (mcg/100 g PC) / 2 ou [CLHP]
Vitamin D = Vitamin D2 + Vitamin D3; analysed by HPLC
Vitamine D = Vitamine D2 + Vitamine D3; analysé par CLHP

Component in English: Vitamin E (expressed in alpha-tocopherol equivalents) or [alpha-tocopherol]
Component in French: Vitamine E (exprimée en équivalent alphatocophérol) ou [alphatocophérol]
Analytical/determination method/definiti: Vitamin E expressed in alpha-tocopherol equivalents (mg/100 g EP) = alpha-tocopherol (mg/100 g EP) + 0.4 × beta-tocopherol (mg/100 g EP) + 0.1 × gamma-tocopherol (mg/100 g EP) + 0.01 × delta-tocotrienol (mg/100 g EP) or [HPLC]

Vitamine E exprimée en équivalent alpha-tocophérol (mg/100 g PC) = alpha-tocophérol (mg/100 g PC) + 0,4 x bêta-tocophérol (mg/100 g PC) + 0,1 x gamma-tocophérol (mg/100 g PC) + 0,01 x deltatocotriénol (mg/100 g PC) ou [CLHP]
Niacin equivalents (mg/100 g EP) = niacin (mg/100 g EP) + tryptophan (mg/100 g EP) / 60 or [HPLC, microbiological]
Équivalent niacine (mg/100 g PC) = niacine (mg/100 g PC) + tryptophane (mg/100 g PC) / 60 ou [CLHP, microbiologique]

Component in English: Folate, total or [folate, sum of vitamers] (vitamin B9)
Component in French: Folate, total ou [somme des vitamères] (vitamine B9)

Équivalent folates alimentaires (mcg/100 g PC) = folates alimentaires naturels (mcg/100 g PC) + 1,7 x acide folique synthétique (mcg/100 g PC)

Fatty acids, total saturated (g/100 g EP) = fatty acids, total saturated (% of total FA) × fatty acid conversion factor × fat, total (g/100 g EP) / 100
Acides gras saturés totaux (g/100 g PC) = acides gras totaux saturés (% d´AG totaux) x facteur de conversion des acides gras x lipides totaux (g/100 g PC) / 100
Fatty acids, total monounsaturated (g/100 g EP) = fatty acids, total monounsaturated (% of total FA) × fatty acid conversion factor × fat, total (g/100 g EP) / 100
Acides gras monoinsaturés totaux (g/100 g PC) = acides gras totaux monoinsaturés (% d´AG totaux) x facteur de conversion des acides gras x lipides totaux (g/100 g PC) / 100
Fatty acids, total polyunsaturated (g/100 g EP) = fatty acids, total polyunsaturated (% of total FA) × fatty acid conversion factor × fat, total (g/100 g EP) / 100
Acides gras polyinsaturés totaux (g/100 g PC) = acides gras totaux polyinsaturés (% d´AG totaux) x facteur de conversion des acides gras x lipides totaux (g/100 g PC) / 100
Linoleic acid (g/100 g EP) = linoleic acid (% of polyunsaturated FA) × fatty acids, total polyunsaturated (g/100 g EP) / 100

Alpha-linolenic acid (g/100 g EP) = alpha-linolenic acid (% of polyunsaturated FA) × fatty acids, total polyunsaturated (g/100 g EP) / 100
Acide alpha-linolénique (g/100 g PC) = acide alpha-linolénique (% d´AG polyinsaturés) x acides gras totaux polyinsaturés (g/100 g PC) / 100
